ham.subject: Your AcmeCRM Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Hello [First Name],

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of AcmeCRM. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will expire on 15th June 2026. To keep uninterrupted access to all features, please renew your plan at your earliest convenience.

You can renew by visiting <URL> or by contacting our support team at support@acmecrm.com.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCRM.

Best regards,
AcmeCRM Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

This is an automated alert from the Microsoft 365 Security Team. Your account password is set to expire in 24 hours. Failure to renew will result in temporary lockout of your account.

To ensure continuous access, please click the link below and follow the instructions:

<URL>

If you do not perform this action, your account may be permanently disabled. This is a mandatory security update.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Microsoft 365 Security
